headline: How The Align Technology (ALGN) Narrative Is Shifting After Pullback And Unchanged US$200 Target
summary: The price target story around Align Technology has shifted over the past few months, with at least one key firm moving from US$170 to US$200 and others lifting their targets as well, before more recently keeping that US$200 level unchanged. Analysts linking the unchanged US$200 target to the 15% pullback from the February high now see the same figure as a more attractive risk/reward setup, especially for investors willing to look past near term geopolitical pressure tied to Middle East...
